---
title: "Homework 8/9 idk, using iris dataset"
format: html
---

```{r}

library(ggplot2)
head(iris)

#x and y are continuous variables and Display the relationship between the variables, Include a fitted regression line

ggplot(iris, aes(x = Sepal.Length, y = Petal.Length)) +
  geom_point(size = 2, alpha = 0.7, color = "black") +
  geom_smooth(method = "lm", se = TRUE, color = "green", fill = "blue") +
  labs(
    title = "Sepal Length vs Petal Length in Iris Flowers Dataset",
    x = "Sepal Length (cm)",
    y = "Petal Length (cm)",
  )





```
